tool.name: detect_waf
tool.description: Detect Web Application Firewall (WAF) presence by fingerprinting HTTP responses. Analyzes headers, cookies, and body content to identify WAF vendors. Makes HTTP requests but does NOT send malicious payloads.

parameter.name: test_payload
parameter.description: Send benign test strings to trigger WAF responses.

returns.description: Success status, detected WAFs, confidence scores, headers analyzed, and recommendations.
